nodes.name: exception.rs
nodes.summary: AArch64 exception handling: EL1 sync/IRQ/FIQ/SError handlers, ESR_EL1 decoding, syscall and page-fault dispatch.

nodes.name: ExceptionClass
nodes.summary: Decoded ESR_EL1 exception class values (SVC, aborts, alignment, debug).

nodes.name: ExceptionContext
nodes.summary: Register save area populated by the asm vector stub: GPRs, SP, ELR, SPSR.

nodes.name: ExceptionClass::from_esr
nodes.summary: Extracts EC bits (26:31) from ESR_EL1 and maps to ExceptionClass.

nodes.name: handle_sync_exception
nodes.summary: C ABI entry for synchronous exceptions; dispatches SVC/data-abort/insn-abort handlers.

nodes.name: handle_irq
nodes.summary: IRQ handler stub invoked from the exception vector.

nodes.name: handle_fiq
nodes.summary: FIQ handler stub for fast interrupts.

nodes.name: handle_serror
nodes.summary: SError handler: reads ESR_EL1 and panics with diagnostics.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: AArch64 crate root: re-exports boot/exception/mmu/registers and defines PAGE_SIZE, KERNEL_VIRT_BASE, virt_to_phys helpers.

nodes.name: virt_to_phys
nodes.summary: Subtracts KERNEL_VIRT_BASE from a virtual address for identity-mapped kernel translation.

nodes.name: phys_to_virt
nodes.summary: Adds KERNEL_VIRT_BASE to a physical address.

nodes.name: mmu.rs
nodes.summary: AArch64 MMU configuration: TTBR0/TTBR1, MAIR, TCR setup and page table management implementing ruvix_hal::Mmu.

nodes.name: Mmu
nodes.summary: AArch64 MMU driver implementing the ruvix_hal Mmu trait.

nodes.name: registers.rs
nodes.summary: Inline-asm accessors for AArch64 EL1 system registers (SCTLR, TCR, MAIR, TTBR0/1, VBAR, ESR, FAR, CurrentEL) plus DSB/ISB barriers.

nodes.name: sctlr_el1_read
nodes.summary: Read SCTLR_EL1.

nodes.name: sctlr_el1_write
nodes.summary: Write SCTLR_EL1.

nodes.name: set_tcr_el1
nodes.summary: Write TCR_EL1 (translation control).

nodes.name: set_mair_el1
nodes.summary: Write MAIR_EL1 (memory attribute indirection).

nodes.name: set_ttbr0_el1
nodes.summary: Write TTBR0_EL1 user-space page table base.

nodes.name: set_ttbr1_el1
nodes.summary: Write TTBR1_EL1 kernel-space page table base.

nodes.name: set_vbar_el1
nodes.summary: Write VBAR_EL1 exception vector base.

nodes.name: esr_el1_read
nodes.summary: Read ESR_EL1.

nodes.name: far_el1_read
nodes.summary: Read FAR_EL1 fault address.

nodes.name: current_el
nodes.summary: Return current exception level from CurrentEL.

nodes.name: dsb
nodes.summary: Data Synchronization Barrier.

nodes.name: isb
nodes.summary: Instruction Synchronization Barrier.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for bcm2711 platform support crate (Raspberry Pi 4 / CM4 BCM2711 SoC).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation overview of the bcm2711 BSP crate (GPIO, mailbox, mini UART, interrupt controller).

nodes.name: gpio.rs
nodes.summary: BCM2711 GPIO driver: pin function select, pull configuration, edge detection.

nodes.name: Gpio
nodes.summary: GPIO controller wrapper around MMIO registers.

nodes.name: Function
nodes.summary: GPIO alternate-function selection values (Input/Output/Alt0..Alt5).

nodes.name: Pull
nodes.summary: GPIO pull configuration (None/Up/Down).

nodes.name: EdgeDetect
nodes.summary: GPIO edge / level detection event selection.

nodes.name: GpioError
nodes.summary: Error type for GPIO operations (invalid pin, etc.).

nodes.name: interrupt.rs
nodes.summary: BCM2711 interrupt controller driver: IRQ enable/disable, IRQ-source IDs (timer, USB, UART, EMMC, etc.).

nodes.name: BcmInterruptController
nodes.summary: Wraps the BCM interrupt controller registers for IRQ routing.

nodes.name: InterruptError
nodes.summary: Error type for interrupt controller operations.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: bcm2711 crate root: re-exports drivers (gpio, interrupt, mailbox, mini_uart, mmio), peripheral base addresses, board revision parsing.

nodes.name: BoardRevision
nodes.summary: Identifies Raspberry Pi 4/CM4 board variant from revision register.

nodes.name: mailbox.rs
nodes.summary: BCM mailbox property-interface driver for VideoCore comms: channels (POWER, FRAMEBUFFER, PROPERTY), clock IDs.

nodes.name: Mailbox
nodes.summary: Mailbox channel driver communicating with the VideoCore firmware.

nodes.name: MailboxError
nodes.summary: Error type for mailbox transactions.

nodes.name: mini_uart.rs
nodes.summary: BCM Mini UART (AUX) driver providing serial console at 115200 baud with fmt::Write support.

nodes.name: MiniUart
nodes.summary: Mini UART driver; implements core::fmt::Write for kernel print.

nodes.name: UartError
nodes.summary: Error type for mini UART operations.

nodes.name: mmio.rs
nodes.summary: Volatile MMIO read/write primitives, memory barriers (dmb/dsb/isb), MmioReg<T> wrapper, delay helpers.

nodes.name: MmioReg
nodes.summary: Generic typed MMIO register wrapper providing volatile read/write.

nodes.name: read_volatile
nodes.summary: Unsafe volatile read primitive over raw pointer.

nodes.name: write_volatile
nodes.summary: Unsafe volatile write primitive over raw pointer.

nodes.name: dmb
nodes.summary: Data Memory Barrier inline-asm wrapper.

nodes.name: dsb
nodes.summary: Data Synchronization Barrier inline-asm wrapper.

nodes.name: isb
nodes.summary: Instruction Synchronization Barrier wrapper.

nodes.name: delay_cycles
nodes.summary: Busy-wait spin loop for N cycles.

nodes.name: delay_us
nodes.summary: Busy-wait helper expressed in microseconds.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvix-boot crate (boot pipeline, manifest verification, attestation).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the ruvix-boot 5-stage boot pipeline and RVF manifest mounting.

nodes.name: attestation.rs
nodes.summary: Boot attestation chain: rolling SHA-256 hash log of attestation entries recording each boot stage.

nodes.name: BootAttestation
nodes.summary: Holds the rolling attestation hash and ordered entry list.

nodes.name: AttestationEntry
nodes.summary: Single attestation record (type, hash, flags) chained into the boot log.

nodes.name: AttestationEntryType
nodes.summary: Categorizes attestation entries (Hardware, Manifest, Capability, Mount, etc.).

nodes.name: AttestationFlags
nodes.summary: Bitflag wrapper expressing properties of an attestation entry.

nodes.name: boot_loader.rs
nodes.summary: Top-level BootLoader orchestrating the 5 boot stages and returning a BootResult with capabilities and attestation.

nodes.name: BootLoader
nodes.summary: Drives Stage0..Stage4 in sequence using configuration and verifier hooks.

nodes.name: BootConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration knobs for the boot loader (signature key, witness policy).

nodes.name: BootResult
nodes.summary: Outcome of a successful boot: capability set, attestation hash, witness log.

nodes.name: BootStage
nodes.summary: Enumerates the 5 boot pipeline stages (Hardware, Verify, Create, Mount, Attest).

nodes.name: capability_distribution.rs
nodes.summary: Distributes minimum-rights capabilities to RVF components and drops root capabilities after handoff.

nodes.name: CapabilityDistribution
nodes.summary: Computes per-component capability grants from the RVF manifest.

nodes.name: ComponentCapabilityGrant
nodes.summary: Set of capabilities granted to a single component.

nodes.name: CapabilityGrant
nodes.summary: Individual capability with object type and rights bits.

nodes.name: MinimumCapabilitySet
nodes.summary: Computes the minimum capability set required from manifest declarations.

nodes.name: RootCapabilityDrop
nodes.summary: Tracks/enforces revocation of root capabilities after boot completes.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruvix-boot crate root: re-exports all boot submodules and ML-DSA-65 size constants.

nodes.name: manifest.rs
nodes.summary: RVF manifest schema: components, queue wirings, memory regions, proof policy, rollback hooks, witness policy.

nodes.name: RvfManifest
nodes.summary: Root manifest declaring an RVF image: version, component graph, regions, proof policy.

nodes.name: ManifestVersion
nodes.summary: Semantic version triple for the manifest schema.

nodes.name: ComponentGraph
nodes.summary: Graph of components and their interconnect queues.

nodes.name: ComponentDecl
nodes.summary: Single component declaration (name, image hash, capabilities).

nodes.name: QueueWiring
nodes.summary: Queue connection between two components.

nodes.name: MemorySchema
nodes.summary: Declares memory regions with policies.

nodes.name: RegionDecl
nodes.summary: Per-region memory declaration with size and policy.

nodes.name: ProofPolicy
nodes.summary: Proof tier requirements per component / operation.

nodes.name: ComponentProofTier
nodes.summary: Required proof tier for a component.

nodes.name: ProofRequiredOps
nodes.summary: Bitmask of operations requiring proofs.

nodes.name: RollbackHooks
nodes.summary: Collection of rollback hooks invoked on failure.

nodes.name: RollbackHook
nodes.summary: Compiled rollback hook (up to 64 KiB bytecode).

nodes.name: WitnessLogPolicy
nodes.summary: Policy controlling witness log retention, compression, export.

nodes.name: WitnessCompression
nodes.summary: Compression mode for witness log output.

nodes.name: WitnessExportPolicy
nodes.summary: Export channel policy for witness logs.

nodes.name: RequiredCapabilities
nodes.summary: Manifest-level required capabilities for the entire image.

nodes.name: mount.rs
nodes.summary: Verifies and mounts an RVF image, producing a MountResult with region and task handles.

nodes.name: RvfMount
nodes.summary: Driver that mounts an RVF image after signature verification.

nodes.name: MountConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration controlling the mount step.

nodes.name: MountResult
nodes.summary: Result of mounting (regions, tasks, attestation hash).

nodes.name: signature.rs
nodes.summary: ML-DSA-65 signature verification entry points for boot artifacts.

nodes.name: SignatureVerifier
nodes.summary: Holds an ML-DSA-65 public key and verifies manifests and signatures.

nodes.name: VerifyResult
nodes.summary: Outcome of a verification operation (Valid, BadSignature, KeyMismatch, etc.).

nodes.name: verify_boot_signature
nodes.summary: Convenience function verifying a manifest signature with a public key.

nodes.name: stages.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the 5 RVF boot stages: Hardware probe, Verify signature, Create tasks, Mount regions, Attest.

nodes.name: Stage0Hardware
nodes.summary: Stage 0 — probe hardware, initialize MMU and core peripherals.

nodes.name: Stage1Verify
nodes.summary: Stage 1 — verify RVF manifest signature and parse manifest.

nodes.name: Stage2Create
nodes.summary: Stage 2 — instantiate tasks and capability distribution from manifest.

nodes.name: Stage3Mount
nodes.summary: Stage 3 — mount memory regions and wire component queues.

nodes.name: Stage4Attest
nodes.summary: Stage 4 — finalize attestation hash, emit witness log entry.

nodes.name: witness_log.rs
nodes.summary: Witness log subsystem: append-only signed log of boot events for later audit.

nodes.name: WitnessLog
nodes.summary: Append-only event log with hash chaining for tamper detection.

nodes.name: WitnessLogEntry
nodes.summary: Single log entry with header and payload.

nodes.name: WitnessLogEntryHeader
nodes.summary: Per-entry header (type, timestamp, hash link).

nodes.name: WitnessLogConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the witness log (sizes, retention, compression).

nodes.name: WitnessLogEntryType
nodes.summary: Categorizes witness log entries (Boot, Capability, Proof, Rollback, ...).

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvix-cap capability subsystem crate.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the ruvix-cap capability/object model used by boot and kernel.
